headline: Northern Trust Expands Asset Servicing With SCERS Win And Digital Push
summary: Northern Trust (NasdaqGS:NTRS) has won a new mandate from the Sacramento County Employees’ Retirement System to provide asset servicing for the public pension fund. The company is investing further in automation for Investment Operations Outsourcing clients through new fintech partnerships. Northern Trust is expanding its digital asset custody capabilities by integrating with the Canton Network. Northern Trust sits at the intersection of global custody, asset servicing and investment...

headline: Northern Trust Wealth Management Appoints Beata Kirr as Chief Investment Officer of Global Family Office
summary: CHICAGO, April 27, 2026--Northern Trust Wealth Management has appointed Beata Kirr as Chief Investment Officer of Global Family Office (GFO).
